job.title: Engineering Manager -Backend
job.description:
About Meesho 
 
Mission and Vision 
 
Meesho is India’s fastest-growing internet commerce company, driven by the mission to democratize internet commerce for everyone (DICE). Our vision is to enable 100 million small businesses and entrepreneurs in India to succeed online, making online commerce accessible to all. This core purpose guides us in empowering sellers across the country and bringing a diverse range of products to first-time internet shoppers. By leveraging technology and a unique zero commission model, Meesho has opened the doors of e-commerce to millions who were previously underserved. 
 
Technological Scale & Innovation
 
 At Meesho, technology is at the heart of our success. We have invested in a scalable infrastructure and innovative solutions to meet the demands of a vast user base and complex marketplace. Some key highlights include: 
 
Massive Scale: Our backend systems handle millions of orders per day from across India, reaching about 5% of all Indian households, all with near-zero downtime to date. Achieving this level of reliability and performance in a hyper-growth environment is a testament to our engineering excellence. 
 
 Marketplace Reach: Over 1.75 million sellers are registered on Meesho’s platform, supported by our state-of-the-art tech infrastructure and pan-India logistics network. This wide reach — covering virtually every serviceable pin code in the country — presents unique engineering challenges in areas like search, personalization, and payments at scale.
 
 Scalable Architecture: We continually innovate our architecture for growth.. Our quest to serve a billion Indian users has helped us evolve our technologies from a monolith to microservices to now a high scale federated architecture. This evolution allows us to build and deploy features rapidly while maintaining stability for a fast-growing user base. 
 
Cutting-edge Tech Stack: Our platform is built using modern, open-source technologies on the cloud while ensuring high efficiency. We strategically choose proven tools (for example, Java and Golang for services, Kafka for messaging, Dragonfly and Redis for caching, ScyllaDB, MySQL and Mongo for Data) and leverage GCP infrastructure to ensure high performance, reliability, and flexibility. By focusing on the right tools for the right problems, we innovate pragmatically rather than chasing every new tech hype, which helps us solve real-world problems effectively. 
 
Engineering Culture & Challenges 
 
Engineering at Meesho is driven by a bold and inclusive culture that values innovation, ownership, and continuous improvement. We believe that building great products goes hand-in-hand with building a great team. Key aspects of our engineering culture include: 
 
Long Term Thinking: We believe in thinking for tomorrow while building for today, this approach has helped us not only to handle and evolve for scale but also focus on extensibility and stability by investing in the platform
 
Lightspeed: We prioritize rapid iteration and delivery. Engineers are encouraged to ship fast and refine continuously, as we value in order to learn and adapt quickly. 
 
Continuous Improvement: We view failures and bugs as opportunities to improve. A blameless post-mortem culture ensures that mistakes become lessons, fostering an environment where learning from failure drives resilience and innovation.
 
 Ownership Mindset: Every engineer is empowered to act like an owner. We instill a “Founder’s Mindset,” encouraging engineers to take end-to-end ownership of projects and drive them with an entrepreneurial spirit. This means our teams proactively identify problems and champion solutions, just as a founder would for their own product. 
 
Engineering at Meesho is more than just writing code – it's about solving complex, impactful problems at an unprecedented scale. Our engineers tackle challenging use cases (from enabling real-time logistics across India to optimizing a vast product catalog for the next billion users), making a tangible impact on millions of entrepreneurs and customers. We maintain a
professional, yet passionate work environment where the drive to innovate is balanced with a pragmatic approach to problem-solving. About the Role
 
We are looking for Engineering Manager well-versed with emerging technologies to join our team.
 As an Engineering Manager, you will ensure consistency and quality by shaping the right strategies. You will keep an eye on all engineering projects and ensure all duties are fulfilled . You will analyse other employees’ tasks and carry on collaborations effectively. You will also transform newbies into experts and build reports on the progress of all projects.

job.title: Manager – Tech Recruitment
job.description:
About the Team
At Meesho, Talent Acquisition isn’t just about hiring — it’s about shaping the future of internet commerce. Our team sits at the heart of Meesho’s mission to democratize e-commerce for everyone (DICE), building the high-impact teams that make this vision a reality.
We work closely with leaders across Engineering, Product, Data, and Business to bring in exceptional talent at scale — without ever compromising on quality, diversity, or candidate experience. Every hire we make directly influences the speed and ambition with which Meesho grows.
What truly sets us apart is how we’re reimagining recruiting through AI. We are an AI-first talent team, pushing far beyond traditional automation:
We’ve moved from keyword-based screening to intelligent success profiling, powered by deep insights from our hiring and performance data.
We’re building fully automated, high-quality AI-led interview experiences.
Our AI Copilot goes beyond note-taking — it actively elevates interviewer capability and decision-making.
If you’re excited about solving complex hiring challenges, leveraging cutting-edge AI, and building teams that drive massive business impact, you’ll feel right at home here. About the Role
As a Manager – Tech Recruitment, you will lead and be responsible for end-to-end talent strategy, hiring delivery, and team leadership for the key engineering orgs, while acting as a trusted advisor to business leaders.
This role goes beyond execution—you will help shape the future of hiring at Meesho by driving data-led decision making and AI-powered recruiting initiatives.              
As Meesho continues its rapid growth, the Tech Recruitment team plays a critical role in building for Bharat by hiring the best of talent across backend, frontend, mobile, data, and platform domains. Our engineering efforts are further strengthened by innovations like BharatMLStack — Meesho’s machine learning platform designed to scale AI use cases for India’s diverse and complex user base.

job.title: Product Manager I
job.description:
About the Team

Product Management in Meesho closely resembles our rapacious growth. Because we obsess over understanding customer behaviour, we’ve been able to carve out an e-commerce niche in Tier 2/3/4 towns in Bharat. Our business growth is testimony to a singular focus on how we think of ‘product’ for our unique customers - ones that have barely shopped online, but are now able to because of Meesho.

Fun fact: Nearly 5% of India’s households shop with us. 

As a Product Manager I, in our team, you will collaborate with Developers, other Product Managers, Designers, Data Scientists, and Engineers. We are driven by a ‘user-first’ mindset. We have a strong bias for action. Above all, our PMs are driven by impact, not features. We drive ‘problem discovery’ & delivery - not only obsess over “what to build”, but execute with rigour to create impact.

But there’s more – we love to have fun as much as we love to work hard. From movie buffs to sportspersons, we have a super cool team. So, if a game of badminton after a day of brainstorming at work sounds like something you would love to do, then join us! About the Role

We are looking for a Product Manager 1 who is passionate about solving high-impact problems in a fast-paced start-up environment with a high degree of autonomy. This is inherently a cross-functional leadership role where you will work closely with teams such as software engineering, UX design, category management, marketing, operations, finance, etc. to bring a new product to life.

job.title: Analytics Manager
job.description:
About the Team
 
With almost 4 Lakh entrepreneurs aboard the Meesho app, we are all set to democratise internet commerce for everyone in India. Our primary responsibility, as the Business org, is to actively drive this mission from the frontlines.
 
As Manager - Business Analytics, you will play a huge role in driving growth across all categories. Our team holds end-to-end responsibility to launch and scale-up categories, by ensuring the right selection, competitive pricing, and conversion. Each category team has an SBM/BM and a group of ABMs, KAMs, and BD Executives. 
 
Within the business team, you'll closely work with the category marketing team and other category teams. Beyond this, you will also work closely with the Product, Supplier Growth, User Growth, and Fulfillment & Experience teams.  
 
We focus on personal growth and fun at work just as much as we do on working hard. That is why, we have regular 1-1s, monthly outings, and timely rewards and recognitions. About the Role
 
If you love making impacts, working with data, creating solutions, and have a knack for finding ways to improve processes.
 
We are looking for a problem-solving, forward-thinking candidate for this role. As Manager - Business Analytics, you will be a leader who can build long-term visions. You will strategize and scale by empowering others in the team as they deliver results while working across other functions such as Product, Tech, and Fulfillment. 
 
You will also receive regular feedback on your work from the CEO and other C-level leaders.

job.title: Manager – HRBP & ER
job.description:
About the Team 
 
Our HR team operates as a strategic partner to the business, focused on cultivating a high-performance culture where exceptional talent thrives. Our work is fundamentally guided by the DICE (Democratize Internet Commerce for Everyone) mission, which underpins our approach to all people strategies. Our core mandate centers on two critical pillars: driving world-class Talent Density and continuously elevating Employee Experience. We achieve this by relentlessly attracting, developing, and retaining the highest caliber of professionals, ensuring that every individual contributes significantly to our success. Concurrently, we are committed to shaping an unparalleled employee experience—one defined by transparent communication, meaningful development, and a deeply engaging, inclusive culture. As stewards of the company's most valuable asset—its people—we design, implement, and champion people strategies that directly translate into sustained business growth and a position as one of India’s most sought-after e-commerce destinations. About the Role
 
We are looking for a seasoned HR Business Partner to lead & manage the 3P / Contract Workforce across multiple Teams and locations. This role will act as the primary HRBP for all third-party employees, driving workforce governance, employee relations, compliance, & productivity in close partnership with Operations. The incumbent will manage a team of 4 HRBPs and work closely with Staffing Partners, TA, HR Ops, Legal, and Business managers to ensure seamless lifecycle management, strong compliance discipline, and a high-performance field workforce. This is a highly field-intensive role requiring strong stakeholder management, ER expertise, data-driven decision-making, & the ability to handle escalations with maturity & speed.

job.title: Deputy Manager - Logistics Intelligence
job.description:
About the Team
 
It’s no secret that Meesho is making massive leaps towards becoming the most used e-commerce app in India. Our Finance team has a key role to play in the company's success. Here’s your chance to be a part of the Meesho success story!😎
As Deputy Manager - Finance, you will be one among the 50+ professionals working in domains such as Financial Reporting, Finance Operations, Business Finance, Treasury Management and Taxation. The team consists of Chartered Accountants, Business experts and Engineers, who have previously worked for internationally renowned organizations.
Our team believes in working hard and partying harder. We organize team trivia nights, board game marathons, and other fun events to foster our team spirit💥. About the role

job.title: Lead Associate - Category Marketing
job.description:
Role Overview

As a Lead Associate for Category Marketing (BPC), you will be at the heart of one of Myntra’s most dynamic portfolios. You will be responsible for defining how beauty brands come to life on the platform, driving high-impact launches, and crafting end-to-end demand generation strategies that resonate with millions of shoppers. This role sits at the intersection of brand storytelling, platform innovation, and data-driven growth, requiring a visionary who can navigate the evolving beauty landscape and build deep connections with diverse customer segments.


Roles and Responsibilities

  • End-to-End Brand Co-Marketing: Partner with leading global and homegrown beauty brands to design and execute comprehensive 360-degree marketing campaigns. You will own the relationship from concept to closure, ensuring seamless integration across onsite, social, and CRM channels.

  • Cohort Strategy & Customer Journeys: Develop a robust strategic plan for various customer cohorts on Myntra Beauty. You will be responsible for building tailored customer journeys that move users from discovery to advocacy, ensuring high retention and lifetime value across different demographics.

  • Gen Z Beauty Strategy: Lead the charge in capturing the next generation of beauty enthusiasts. Conceptualize and drive a dedicated Gen Z strategy that leverages trends, authenticity, and "digital-first" content to make Myntra the preferred destination for young shoppers.

  • Search & Discovery Enhancement: Elevate the search experience from a customer point of view. You will advocate for an intuitive, frictionless discovery process, ensuring that the platform’s interface reflects how beauty customers actually want to browse and shop.

  • Feature Innovation: Collaborate closely with technical platform leads and feature owners to advocate for and implement desired app functionalities. You will bridge the gap between marketing needs and technical execution to build a best-in-class shopping interface.

  • Integrated Marketing Collaboration: Work in lockstep with the broader marketing team to synchronize category goals with brand campaigns, influencer marketing, social media strategy, performance marketing, and affiliate programs. * Creative Innovation & Storytelling: Move beyond standard templates to conceptualize high-visual-impact campaigns. Define the visual language for BPC categories, ensuring creative assets drive both brand love and conversion.

  • High-Impact Launches: Own the end-to-end marketing roadmap for new brand and product launches within the BPC space, ensuring maximum market "buzz."

  • Performance Analytics: Deep-dive into storefront metrics and data to extract actionable insights, correcting funnel leakages and optimizing CTRs through rigorous experimentation.

Qualifications & Experience

  • Experience: 3+ years in E-commerce Marketing, Category Marketing, or Brand Marketing (Experience in Beauty/Lifestyle is a major plus).

  • Strategic Agility: Proven ability to build customer-centric strategies and manage complex customer lifecycles across diverse cohorts.

  • Execution Power: Demonstrated ability to manage complex, end-to-end projects autonomously in a fast-paced environment.

  • Collaboration Skills: Strong ability to work across specialized marketing functions (Influencer, Social, Performance) and influence technical teams without direct authority.

  • Analytical Rigor: Strong comfort with numbers and MS Excel; ability to turn raw data into a compelling marketing story.

  • Communication: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills—the ability to take a brief, challenge it when necessary, and run with it.

job.description:
About the Team
Financial Services at Meesho is building one of the largest digital lending businesses for Bharat. As we scale to millions of users, the next phase of growth will be defined by how intelligently we manage credit performance across the lifecycle — from underwriting to repayment and recovery.
The DARC (Data Science, Analytics, Risk & Collections) team acts as the decisioning engine for this business — combining data, risk, and systems thinking to drive portfolio outcomes. About the Role: Credit Portfolio Optimization
This is a high-ownership, high-impact role focused on maximizing portfolio performance post-disbursement.
You will act as the central problem solver for credit performance — identifying where we are losing money across the repayment lifecycle, diagnosing root causes, and designing interventions that improve outcomes at scale.
This is not a collections or operations role.This is a strategy + systems role with direct impact on metrics like NCL, cure rates, cost-to-recovery, and customer lifetime value.

job.title: Engineering Manager -Backend
job.description:
About Meesho 
 
Mission and Vision 
 
Meesho is India’s fastest-growing internet commerce company, driven by the mission to democratize internet commerce for everyone (DICE). Our vision is to enable 100 million small businesses and entrepreneurs in India to succeed online, making online commerce accessible to all. This core purpose guides us in empowering sellers across the country and bringing a diverse range of products to first-time internet shoppers. By leveraging technology and a unique zero commission model, Meesho has opened the doors of e-commerce to millions who were previously underserved. 
 
Technological Scale & Innovation
 
 At Meesho, technology is at the heart of our success. We have invested in a scalable infrastructure and innovative solutions to meet the demands of a vast user base and complex marketplace. Some key highlights include: 
 
Massive Scale: Our backend systems handle millions of orders per day from across India, reaching about 5% of all Indian households, all with near-zero downtime to date. Achieving this level of reliability and performance in a hyper-growth environment is a testament to our engineering excellence. 
 
 Marketplace Reach: Over 1.75 million sellers are registered on Meesho’s platform, supported by our state-of-the-art tech infrastructure and pan-India logistics network. This wide reach — covering virtually every serviceable pin code in the country — presents unique engineering challenges in areas like search, personalization, and payments at scale.
 
 Scalable Architecture: We continually innovate our architecture for growth.. Our quest to serve a billion Indian users has helped us evolve our technologies from a monolith to microservices to now a high scale federated architecture. This evolution allows us to build and deploy features rapidly while maintaining stability for a fast-growing user base. 
 
Cutting-edge Tech Stack: Our platform is built using modern, open-source technologies on the cloud while ensuring high efficiency. We strategically choose proven tools (for example, Java and Golang for services, Kafka for messaging, Dragonfly and Redis for caching, ScyllaDB, MySQL and Mongo for Data) and leverage GCP infrastructure to ensure high performance, reliability, and flexibility. By focusing on the right tools for the right problems, we innovate pragmatically rather than chasing every new tech hype, which helps us solve real-world problems effectively. 
 
Engineering Culture & Challenges 
 
Engineering at Meesho is driven by a bold and inclusive culture that values innovation, ownership, and continuous improvement. We believe that building great products goes hand-in-hand with building a great team. Key aspects of our engineering culture include: 
 
Long Term Thinking: We believe in thinking for tomorrow while building for today, this approach has helped us not only to handle and evolve for scale but also focus on extensibility and stability by investing in the platform
 
Lightspeed: We prioritize rapid iteration and delivery. Engineers are encouraged to ship fast and refine continuously, as we value in order to learn and adapt quickly. 
 
Continuous Improvement: We view failures and bugs as opportunities to improve. A blameless post-mortem culture ensures that mistakes become lessons, fostering an environment where learning from failure drives resilience and innovation.
 
 Ownership Mindset: Every engineer is empowered to act like an owner. We instill a “Founder’s Mindset,” encouraging engineers to take end-to-end ownership of projects and drive them with an entrepreneurial spirit. This means our teams proactively identify problems and champion solutions, just as a founder would for their own product. 
 
Engineering at Meesho is more than just writing code – it's about solving complex, impactful problems at an unprecedented scale. Our engineers tackle challenging use cases (from enabling real-time logistics across India to optimizing a vast product catalog for the next billion users), making a tangible impact on millions of entrepreneurs and customers. We maintain a
professional, yet passionate work environment where the drive to innovate is balanced with a pragmatic approach to problem-solving. About the Role
 
We are looking for Engineering Manager well-versed with emerging technologies to join our team.
 As an Engineering Manager, you will ensure consistency and quality by shaping the right strategies. You will keep an eye on all engineering projects and ensure all duties are fulfilled . You will analyse other employees’ tasks and carry on collaborations effectively. You will also transform newbies into experts and build reports on the progress of all projects.

Massive Scale: Our backend systems handle millions of orders per day from across India, reaching about 5% of all Indian households, all with near-zero downtime to date. Achieving this level of reliability and performance in a hyper-growth environment is a testament to our engineering excellence. 
 
 Marketplace Reach: Over 1.75 million sellers are registered on Meesho’s platform, supported by our state-of-the-art tech infrastructure and pan-India logistics network. This wide reach — covering virtually every serviceable pin code in the country — presents unique engineering challenges in areas like search, personalization, and payments at scale.
 
 Scalable Architecture: We continually innovate our architecture for growth.. Our quest to serve a billion Indian users has helped us evolve our technologies from a monolith to microservices to now a high scale federated architecture. This evolution allows us to build and deploy features rapidly while maintaining stability for a fast-growing user base. 
 
Cutting-edge Tech Stack: Our platform is built using modern, open-source technologies on the cloud while ensuring high efficiency. We strategically choose proven tools (for example, Java and Golang for services, Kafka for messaging, Dragonfly and Redis for caching, ScyllaDB, MySQL and Mongo for Data) and leverage GCP infrastructure to ensure high performance, reliability, and flexibility. By focusing on the right tools for the right problems, we innovate pragmatically rather than chasing every new tech hype, which helps us solve real-world problems effectively. 
 
Engineering Culture & Challenges 
 
Engineering at Meesho is driven by a bold and inclusive culture that values innovation, ownership, and continuous improvement. We believe that building great products goes hand-in-hand with building a great team. Key aspects of our engineering culture include: 
 
Long Term Thinking: We believe in thinking for tomorrow while building for today, this approach has helped us not only to handle and evolve for scale but also focus on extensibility and stability by investing in the platform
 
Lightspeed: We prioritize rapid iteration and delivery. Engineers are encouraged to ship fast and refine continuously, as we value in order to learn and adapt quickly. 
 
Continuous Improvement: We view failures and bugs as opportunities to improve. A blameless post-mortem culture ensures that mistakes become lessons, fostering an environment where learning from failure drives resilience and innovation.
 
 Ownership Mindset: Every engineer is empowered to act like an owner. We instill a “Founder’s Mindset,” encouraging engineers to take end-to-end ownership of projects and drive them with an entrepreneurial spirit. This means our teams proactively identify problems and champion solutions, just as a founder would for their own product. 
 
Engineering at Meesho is more than just writing code – it's about solving complex, impactful problems at an unprecedented scale. Our engineers tackle challenging use cases (from enabling real-time logistics across India to optimizing a vast product catalog for the next billion users), making a tangible impact on millions of entrepreneurs and customers. We maintain a
professional, yet passionate work environment where the drive to innovate is balanced with a pragmatic approach to problem-solving.

job.title: Manager – Tech Recruitment
job.description:
About the Team
At Meesho, Talent Acquisition isn’t just about hiring — it’s about shaping the future of internet commerce. Our team sits at the heart of Meesho’s mission to democratize e-commerce for everyone (DICE), building the high-impact teams that make this vision a reality.
We work closely with leaders across Engineering, Product, Data, and Business to bring in exceptional talent at scale — without ever compromising on quality, diversity, or candidate experience. Every hire we make directly influences the speed and ambition with which Meesho grows.
What truly sets us apart is how we’re reimagining recruiting through AI. We are an AI-first talent team, pushing far beyond traditional automation:
We’ve moved from keyword-based screening to intelligent success profiling, powered by deep insights from our hiring and performance data.
We’re building fully automated, high-quality AI-led interview experiences.
Our AI Copilot goes beyond note-taking — it actively elevates interviewer capability and decision-making.
If you’re excited about solving complex hiring challenges, leveraging cutting-edge AI, and building teams that drive massive business impact, you’ll feel right at home here. About the Role
As a Manager – Tech Recruitment, you will lead and be responsible for end-to-end talent strategy, hiring delivery, and team leadership for the key engineering orgs, while acting as a trusted advisor to business leaders.
This role goes beyond execution—you will help shape the future of hiring at Meesho by driving data-led decision making and AI-powered recruiting initiatives.              
As Meesho continues its rapid growth, the Tech Recruitment team plays a critical role in building for Bharat by hiring the best of talent across backend, frontend, mobile, data, and platform domains. Our engineering efforts are further strengthened by innovations like BharatMLStack — Meesho’s machine learning platform designed to scale AI use cases for India’s diverse and complex user base.

job.title: Product Manager I
job.description:
About the Team

Product Management in Meesho closely resembles our rapacious growth. Because we obsess over understanding customer behaviour, we’ve been able to carve out an e-commerce niche in Tier 2/3/4 towns in Bharat. Our business growth is testimony to a singular focus on how we think of ‘product’ for our unique customers - ones that have barely shopped online, but are now able to because of Meesho.

Fun fact: Nearly 5% of India’s households shop with us. 

As a Product Manager I, in our team, you will collaborate with Developers, other Product Managers, Designers, Data Scientists, and Engineers. We are driven by a ‘user-first’ mindset. We have a strong bias for action. Above all, our PMs are driven by impact, not features. We drive ‘problem discovery’ & delivery - not only obsess over “what to build”, but execute with rigour to create impact.

But there’s more – we love to have fun as much as we love to work hard. From movie buffs to sportspersons, we have a super cool team. So, if a game of badminton after a day of brainstorming at work sounds like something you would love to do, then join us! About the Role

We are looking for a Product Manager 1 who is passionate about solving high-impact problems in a fast-paced start-up environment with a high degree of autonomy. This is inherently a cross-functional leadership role where you will work closely with teams such as software engineering, UX design, category management, marketing, operations, finance, etc. to bring a new product to life.

job.title: Manager – HRBP & ER
job.description:
About the Team 
 
Our HR team operates as a strategic partner to the business, focused on cultivating a high-performance culture where exceptional talent thrives. Our work is fundamentally guided by the DICE (Democratize Internet Commerce for Everyone) mission, which underpins our approach to all people strategies. Our core mandate centers on two critical pillars: driving world-class Talent Density and continuously elevating Employee Experience. We achieve this by relentlessly attracting, developing, and retaining the highest caliber of professionals, ensuring that every individual contributes significantly to our success. Concurrently, we are committed to shaping an unparalleled employee experience—one defined by transparent communication, meaningful development, and a deeply engaging, inclusive culture. As stewards of the company's most valuable asset—its people—we design, implement, and champion people strategies that directly translate into sustained business growth and a position as one of India’s most sought-after e-commerce destinations. About the Role
 
We are looking for a seasoned HR Business Partner to lead & manage the 3P / Contract Workforce across multiple Teams and locations. This role will act as the primary HRBP for all third-party employees, driving workforce governance, employee relations, compliance, & productivity in close partnership with Operations. The incumbent will manage a team of 4 HRBPs and work closely with Staffing Partners, TA, HR Ops, Legal, and Business managers to ensure seamless lifecycle management, strong compliance discipline, and a high-performance field workforce. This is a highly field-intensive role requiring strong stakeholder management, ER expertise, data-driven decision-making, & the ability to handle escalations with maturity & speed.

job.description:
Role Overview

As a Lead Associate for Category Marketing (BPC), you will be at the heart of one of Myntra’s most dynamic portfolios. You will be responsible for defining how beauty brands come to life on the platform, driving high-impact launches, and crafting end-to-end demand generation strategies that resonate with millions of shoppers. This role sits at the intersection of brand storytelling, platform innovation, and data-driven growth, requiring a visionary who can navigate the evolving beauty landscape and build deep connections with diverse customer segments.


Roles and Responsibilities

  • End-to-End Brand Co-Marketing: Partner with leading global and homegrown beauty brands to design and execute comprehensive 360-degree marketing campaigns. You will own the relationship from concept to closure, ensuring seamless integration across onsite, social, and CRM channels.

  • Cohort Strategy & Customer Journeys: Develop a robust strategic plan for various customer cohorts on Myntra Beauty. You will be responsible for building tailored customer journeys that move users from discovery to advocacy, ensuring high retention and lifetime value across different demographics.

  • Gen Z Beauty Strategy: Lead the charge in capturing the next generation of beauty enthusiasts. Conceptualize and drive a dedicated Gen Z strategy that leverages trends, authenticity, and "digital-first" content to make Myntra the preferred destination for young shoppers.

  • Search & Discovery Enhancement: Elevate the search experience from a customer point of view. You will advocate for an intuitive, frictionless discovery process, ensuring that the platform’s interface reflects how beauty customers actually want to browse and shop.

  • Feature Innovation: Collaborate closely with technical platform leads and feature owners to advocate for and implement desired app functionalities. You will bridge the gap between marketing needs and technical execution to build a best-in-class shopping interface.

  • Integrated Marketing Collaboration: Work in lockstep with the broader marketing team to synchronize category goals with brand campaigns, influencer marketing, social media strategy, performance marketing, and affiliate programs. * Creative Innovation & Storytelling: Move beyond standard templates to conceptualize high-visual-impact campaigns. Define the visual language for BPC categories, ensuring creative assets drive both brand love and conversion.

  • High-Impact Launches: Own the end-to-end marketing roadmap for new brand and product launches within the BPC space, ensuring maximum market "buzz."

  • Performance Analytics: Deep-dive into storefront metrics and data to extract actionable insights, correcting funnel leakages and optimizing CTRs through rigorous experimentation.

Qualifications & Experience

  • Experience: 3+ years in E-commerce Marketing, Category Marketing, or Brand Marketing (Experience in Beauty/Lifestyle is a major plus).

  • Strategic Agility: Proven ability to build customer-centric strategies and manage complex customer lifecycles across diverse cohorts.

  • Execution Power: Demonstrated ability to manage complex, end-to-end projects autonomously in a fast-paced environment.

  • Collaboration Skills: Strong ability to work across specialized marketing functions (Influencer, Social, Performance) and influence technical teams without direct authority.

  • Analytical Rigor: Strong comfort with numbers and MS Excel; ability to turn raw data into a compelling marketing story.

  • Communication: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills—the ability to take a brief, challenge it when necessary, and run with it.

job.title: Assistant Manager - Corporate Communication
job.description:
About the Team
The Communications team at Meesho is responsible for shaping narratives that reflect the company’s mission to democratize internet commerce, while building trust, credibility and long-term reputation as a publicly listed company. The team works closely with leadership to drive communication across media, investors, analysts and broader stakeholders, anchored in transparency, governance, financial discipline and operational excellence.
 
About the Team
 
This role will support corporate and investor communications, working closely with Investor Relations, legal and business teams. The mandate is to ensure consistent, compliant and high-impact communication that accurately represents Meesho’s performance, strategy and long-term vision in the public markets. The role is suited for someone with experience in corporate PR and exposure to financial communications, who can translate business and financial information into clear, credible narratives.

About the Team
You will be part of the Seller Growth team, responsible for driving the end-to-end seller lifecycle—from acquisition and activation to retention and scale. The team focuses on onboarding high-quality sellers, improving their early success, and enabling sustained business growth on the platform.
Operating in a fast-paced, high-ownership environment, the team combines structured problem-solving with rapid execution to unlock supply-side growth at scale. About the Role
We are looking for a Assistant Manager– Performance Marketing to join our Seller Growth team.
In this role, you will own and scale seller acquisition and activation through performance marketing channels such as Google, Meta, and emerging platforms. You will focus on driving high-quality seller onboarding, improving activation rates, and optimizing CAC and payback periods.
This role requires a strong analytical mindset, experimentation-led thinking, and the ability to translate data into actionable growth strategies.

job.title: Manager - Business Finance
job.description:
About the Team   
 
The BizFin team at Meesho is a close-knit and high-performing group that brings together a diverse mix of professionals from Big 4 consulting, FMCG giants, and top-tier investment firms. Our members include Chartered Accountants (many of whom are rank holders), business specialists, and former investment bankers — each contributing a unique perspective and skill set.
 
We thrive on solving complex, high-impact business problems across Meesho’s ecosystem. Whether it's driving growth strategy or streamlining financial operations, the team plays a critical role in shaping key decisions that drive the company's success.
 
We believe in cross-functional exposure, ensuring team members gain experience across different areas of the business, enabling continuous learning and a broader perspective. At our core, we value both excellence in our work and strong team bonds, creating a culture that celebrates collaboration, achievement, and the collective impact we make. About the Role
 
As a Business Finance expert, you’ll be one among the 50+ professionals working in domains such as Financial Reporting, Finance Operations, Business Finance, Treasury Management and Taxation.
 
You will get a chance to work closely with some of the sharpest minds from the finance industry, and solve complex challenges.
 
We thrive on solving complex, high-impact business problems across Meesho’s ecosystem. Whether it's driving growth strategy or streamlining financial operations, the team plays a critical role in shaping key decisions that drive the company's success.

job.title: Manager - Portfolio Strategy and Intelligence
job.description:
About the Team
Financial Services at Meesho is building one of the largest digital lending businesses for Bharat. As we scale to millions of users, the next phase of growth will be defined by how intelligently we manage credit performance across the lifecycle — from underwriting to repayment and recovery.
The DARC (Data Science, Analytics, Risk & Collections) team acts as the decisioning engine for this business — combining data, risk, and systems thinking to drive portfolio outcomes. About the Role: Credit Portfolio Optimization
This is a high-ownership, high-impact role focused on maximizing portfolio performance post-disbursement.
You will act as the central problem solver for credit performance — identifying where we are losing money across the repayment lifecycle, diagnosing root causes, and designing interventions that improve outcomes at scale.
This is not a collections or operations role.This is a strategy + systems role with direct impact on metrics like NCL, cure rates, cost-to-recovery, and customer lifetime value.

job.title: Senior Business Development Manager (SBDM)
job.description:
About the team

ValMo is Meesho’s logistics and supply chain organization, responsible for building India’s most cost-efficient, reliable, and scalable fulfillment network. From first-mile pickup to last-mile delivery and reverse logistics, ValMo powers millions of shipments every month for small businesses across the country.
Valmo (Meesho’s Logistics Arm) is building India’s largest and most efficient hyperlocal self-pickup network: Meesho Pickup Point. We are partnering with local Kiranas, pharmacies, and telecom shops to serve as highly dense, zero-effort pickup points for our prepaid customers. About the Role

As the SBDM, you will be the CEO of your "Mega Region," directly managing a large team of Business Development Managers (BDMs) to blanket your city with Meesho Pickup Points.
